title: Mixed content speed sprint
description: Words + numbers + light symbols at speed — pre-final warmup
text: Order #4521 ships Monday for $129.50. Customer ID 7821 (priority) needs follow-up by 14:30 today. Team meeting at 9 a.m. Slack channel: #ops-2026. Backup: 100% verified. Time saved: 45 min.
tips: Real ops/business text mixes everything — train mixed content
Don't slow for digits — they should be as fast as letters by now
Symbols ($, #, %) flow into the same rhythm as text

character_tips.anna: Mixed content is where most pros plateau. Push through it here.
character_tips.maxim: Real writing isn't just words. Drill mixed content like this until uniform.
character_tips.knopych: ALL THE KEYS! 🎮 Symbols, numbers, letters — full keyboard!
character_tips.klavochka: Every part of the keyboard your friend now, my treasure 💎
